_authoring_notes: FSI Offers Section 5 — Alliance Includes More. 4-card strip surfacing the broader Alliance benefits beyond FSI Offers platform itself.
Card labels lifted from RE Pros 03-tiers Alliance sub-cards verbatim: Media (MortgagePoint), Education (Five Star Academy), Events, Channel Discounts.
Purpose: reinforce that Alliance is more than this platform. Sits AFTER the tier ladder where readers have already evaluated platform-only value.
Card pattern: white bg, 1px border, gold eyebrow → serif title → body text. Matches RE Pros tile aesthetic.

settings.html:
Alliance Is More Than the Platform

FSI Offers is one of the benefits Five Star Alliance unlocks. Membership also includes the editorial, education, and event access that has defined the FSI community for two decades.

Media

MortgagePoint

Full subscription. MP Daily newsletter, digital magazine, MP Access podcast, and discounted media placement.

Education

Five Star Academy

Select complimentary courses. 20% off certain educational offerings.

Events

Event Discounts

10% off registration to Velocity, Five Star Conference, Legal League Servicer Summit, Government Forum, and all FSI events.

Channel Discounts

Community Standing

Community Corner profile eligibility in MortgagePoint, plus 10% off all FSI advertising and sponsorships.
